name: multi-search-engine
tagline: ClawHub (752★): Multi search engine integration with 16 engines (7 CN + 9 Global). Supports advanced search operators, time filters, site s
verdict: Directly contradicts its own workflow: its core process fetches 16 external search URLs, which conflicts with what the skill claims elsewhere. It also never says when not to use it despite being a broad general-purpose search tool, and never defines what its final report should contain.

highlights.summary: Directly contradicts the skill's own core workflow, which fetches 16 external search-engine URLs via web_fetch, e.g. line 16: 'Use web_fetch to execute search requests with rate li
No format, location, or required sections are specified for the 'core search report' deliverable.
Neither the description nor the body contains any 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language, despite this being a broad general-purpose search skill likely to over
